description: Wallet #11 is the highest fee earner (219 SOL in 30d) with fast-trading style. Average hold only 1.9 hours, suggesting quick entry/exit strategy. Win rate 83.5% indicates strong pool selection.

lessons.title: Fast Entry/Exit Strategy
lessons.content: Top performers by fees hold < 1 hour. Examples: unc-SOL (19m, $17.60 fees, +12% PnL), ALONSHOUSE-SOL (49m, $17.45 fees, +9.4% PnL), Peepa-SOL (39m, $13.74 fees, +0.6% PnL). Fast trades capture fees without long IL exposure.
lessons.action: Prefer quick-exit strategy. Target 30-60 min holds. Don't hold hoping for more — take fees and move.

lessons.title: 50 Bins Has Best Win Rate (69%)
lessons.content: Historical analysis: bins_below=50 has 69% win rate +0.63% avg PnL. bins_below=35 is popular (47 trades) but only 57% win rate. bins_below=64 has high PnL (4.1%) but rare. bins_below=31 and 42 also 100% win rate but low sample.
lessons.action: Default to 50 bins for spot strategy. Safe middle ground with good win rate. Use 35 only when short on time or high conviction.

lessons.title: Repeat on Good Pools
lessons.content: Some pools repeat in top performers: Iroha-SOL (4x), unc-SOL (2x), GENZ-SOL (2x). Good pools get revisited by smart money. If a pool already paid out once, likely to pay again.
lessons.action: Check pool-memory for past performance. If pool has history of positive PnL for others, strong signal to deploy.

lessons.title: BidAsk Works for Fast Trades Too
lessons.content: Peepa-SOL: bid_ask strategy, 39m hold, $13.74 fees, +0.6% PnL. GENZ-SOL: bid_ask, 103m hold, $8.31 fees, +0.12% PnL. BidAsk isn't just for slow compounding — can work for fast mode too.
lessons.action: Use bid_ask for fast trades when volatility is high or direction is unclear. Spot when confident token will pump.
